# go-dblog

`go-dblog` is a multi-module Go library for parsing database change logs and
adapting them to a shared event API.

## Modules

- `github.com/Infranite/go-dblog`: common registry, event, checkpoint, filter,
  flashback, and recovery plan contracts.
- `github.com/Infranite/go-dblog/mysql`: MySQL-family binlog parser and
  replication stream reader.
- `github.com/Infranite/go-dblog/postgres`: PostgreSQL logical decoding text
  parser, SQL slot reader, and wire-level replication reader for `test_decoding`.
- `github.com/Infranite/go-dblog/mongo`: MongoDB oplog/change stream JSON
  parser and live change stream reader.
- `github.com/Infranite/go-dblog/redis`: Redis AOF RESP parser and replication
  stream reader.

## Documentation

- `README.md`: project overview and product index.
- `doc/README.zh-CN.md`: Chinese project overview and product index.
- `doc/ROADMAP.md` and `doc/ROADMAP.zh-CN.md`: release targets, per-product
  supported and unsupported scope, CI evidence, and next work.
- `doc/RECOVERY.md` and `doc/RECOVERY.zh-CN.md`: recovery plan and replay
  cookbook.
- `doc/DEVELOPMENT.md` and `doc/DEVELOPMENT.zh-CN.md`: local checks, fixture
  debugging, pull request flow, and versioning rules.
- `doc/SECURITY.md` and `doc/SECURITY.zh-CN.md`: vulnerability reporting policy.
- `mysql/README.md` and `mysql/README.zh-CN.md`: MySQL-family backend entry
  pages. Detailed features and examples live in `mysql/doc/`.
- `postgres/README.md` and `postgres/README.zh-CN.md`: PostgreSQL-family
  backend entry pages. Detailed features and examples live in `postgres/doc/`.
- `mongo/README.md` and `mongo/README.zh-CN.md`: MongoDB-family backend entry
  pages. Detailed features and examples live in `mongo/doc/`.
- `redis/README.md` and `redis/README.zh-CN.md`: Redis-family backend entry
  pages. Detailed features and examples live in `redis/doc/`.
- `mysql/doc/`, `postgres/doc/`, `mongo/doc/`, and `redis/doc/`: bilingual
  product feature/scope references and usage examples.

There are no standalone `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `RELEASE.md`, or `CHANGELOG.md`
files. Contribution flow is documented in `doc/DEVELOPMENT.md`; public releases
use GitHub Releases and git tags; git history is the detailed change log.

The current public release is the `v0.3.0` tag set with root tag `v0.3.0` and
backend tags `mysql/v0.3.0`, `postgres/v0.3.0`, `mongo/v0.3.0`, and
`redis/v0.3.0`.

## Checks

```bash
make lint
make test
make fuzz-smoke
make bench-smoke
```

Run fixture-backed integration tests when Docker is available:

```bash
make integration
```
